sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: The Virgin of Christ * is not shaken by terror nor seduced by favours;;10
His Holy body * is already united to me, and his blood is red upon my cheeks;;45
A lamb whiter than snow stood at her right hand, Christ consecrating her his bride and martyr.;;84

sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: The Lord hath sent his angel, * and hath delivered me out of the fire I was not burnt;;249;250;251
